  • Method Details

    • act

      public void act()
      Overrides:
      act in class greenfoot.Actor

    • move

      public void move()
      Move one cell forward in the current direction.

      Initial: Dodo is somewhere in the world

      Final: If possible, Dodo has moved forward one cell

    • canMove

      public boolean canMove()
      Test if Dodo can move forward, i.e. there are no obstructions or end of world in the cell in front of her.

      Initial: Dodo is somewhere in the world

      Final: Same as initial situation

      Returns:
      boolean true if Dodo can move (thus, no obstructions ahead) false if Dodo can't move there is an obstruction or end of world ahead

    • jump

      public void jump(int distance)
      Move given number of cells forward in the current direction.

      Initial:

      Final:

      Parameters:
      int - distance: the number of steps made

    • locationReached

      public boolean locationReached(int x, int y)
      Test goToLocation

      dodo is on a certain x invalid input: '&' y place.

      dodo needs to go to a certain x invalid input: '&' y place.

      dodo needs to check if the location is reached Final situation:

      dodo is on the certain x invalid input: '&' y place.

    • validCoordinates

      public boolean validCoordinates(int x, int y)
      Test validCoordinates

      Dodo fills in the coordinates

      System recognizes that the coordinates do not exist.

      Systen returns true/false Final situation:

      System returns true/false

      System tells to move or not

    • moveRandomly

      public void moveRandomly()
      Test moveRandomly

      Dodo will move randomly

      Dodo can not move more than 40 steps

      Dodo can not walk against a fence

      Dodo can not walk against the border Final situation:

      Dodo moves 40 steps randomly

      Dodo won't walk against a border nor fence

    • pickUpNearestEggInList

      public void pickUpNearestEggInList()
      Test pickUpNearestEggInList

      No initial situation

      Get list of eggs

      Determine destination: nearest egg

      Walk to nearest egg

      Walk to destination

      Pick up egg Final situation:

      Dodo walks to nearest egg and picks it up
